summary:
Given an input string s and a pattern p, determine whether the pattern matches the entire string. The pattern may contain two special characters: '.' matches any single character, and '*' matches zero or more copies of the element immediately before it.

The match must cover the whole string s, not just a part of it. Return true if the pattern matches and false otherwise.

examples.explanation: The pattern "a" matches only a single character, so it cannot cover the two-character string "aa".
"a*" can stand for any number of 'a' characters, including two, so it matches "aa".

constraints: s contains only lowercase English letters
p contains lowercase letters plus the special characters '.' and '*'
Every '*' in p is preceded by a valid character that it can repeat
